model.name: TTS Stable Audio 3 Small Music
model.description: Lightweight music-focused model for instrumentals, loops, grooves, and song-like ideas up to 120 seconds. Best when the prompt describes genre, tempo, instruments, mood, and musical structure.

prompt: Lo-fi house loop with warm tape saturation, mellow bass, soft vinyl crackle, and a relaxed 120 BPM groove.
